rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption is unrelated to Elec. Code §253.1621, which governs campaign contribution and reimbursement limits for candidates. No overlap exists.
quote: For purposes of the contribution limits prescribed by Section 253.155 or 253.157 and the limit on reimbursement of personal funds and repayment of certain loans prescribed by Section 253.162, the general and primary elections are considered separate elections for a candidate whose name appears on the ballot.
_note: No conflict; rule_text concerns election finance, proposed change concerns property tax exemptions.
